promptHero.title: What to create?
promptHero.description: Describe what you want to create — or use the categories below for inspiration.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Your workspace: manage files and chat with the agent in Notebook. Automations schedules recurring tasks.

create.title: Create directly
create.description: Generate images, videos, and localized ads — without going through chat.

fileBrowser.title: File browser
fileBrowser.description: View all files in your workspace. Create new ones, upload, or drag & drop.

editor.title: Editor
editor.description: Open a file from the file tree to edit it here.

editorMode.title: View mode
editorMode.description: Switch between editor, editor with preview, and pure preview in the top-right corner.

chat.title: Agent chat
chat.description: Chat with the agent, reference files with @, or start with a prompt suggestion.

models.title: Model Library
models.description: Manage products and personas as referenceable models for AI generations.

agentSettings.title: Provider & model
agentSettings.description: Choose the AI provider and model. This determines which agent processes your prompts.

managedFiles.title: Agent prompt
managedFiles.description: These files control your agent's behavior and knowledge. AGENTS.md is the main instruction, other files add identity, memory, and skills.

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Enable or disable individual agent tools. Disable tools you don't need to keep the agent focused.

integrations.title: Integrations env
integrations.description: Manage API keys and environment variables for external services — e.g. Gemini, OpenAI, Brave. Use KV mode to edit individual values, or Raw mode for the full file.

agentsEnv.title: Agents env
agentsEnv.description: Separate environment variables for agent-specific providers like OpenRouter, Ollama, or Anthropic.

studio.title: Studio
studio.comingSoon: Coming Soon — This feature will be available soon.

notebook.emptyStateTitle: Open a file or start directly in chat.

notebook.imagePreprocessDescription: Some images need conversion before they can be used in the browser.

notebook.deleteMultipleDescription: You are about to delete {count} items. This action cannot be undone.
notebook.moveIntoSelf: Cannot move a folder into itself.

notebook.fileConflictExplanation: Choose how to handle this file conflict. You can skip this file, keep the existing file, or overwrite it with the selected file.
notebook.directoryConflictError: Cannot move: A directory already exists at '{destination}'. Directory conflicts must be resolved manually.

notebook.htmlPreviewBlockedDescription: "{fileName}" will only load after you explicitly open the preview.
notebook.marpExportImagesDescription: Exports all slides from "{fileName}" as a ZIP file.
notebook.binaryPreviewUnavailable: Binary file preview is not available.
notebook.publicShareDescription: Create read-only public URLs for selected workspace files.
notebook.publicShareWarning: Anyone with the link can read the published file without logging in. HTML is served through a strict no-script sandbox; this route never accepts writes.
notebook.publicShareAlreadyPublishedAll: All selected files already have public links.

chat.metadataDescription: Fullscreen chat app for the Canvas Notebook workspace.
chat.title: CANVAS CHAT

History budget: {used} of {available} tokens used ({percent}%)

Reserved for system, tools, response, and safety: approx. {reserved} tokens

chat.workedSteps: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} hidden
chat.starterTitle: What should Canvas Chat prepare for you?
chat.starterDescription: Start with a template for campaigns, creatives, strategies, documents, or a better file organization.
chat.studioStarterTitle: What should Canvas Studio create for you?
chat.studioStarterDescription: Start with prompts for product photos, video generation, creative variants, presets, or improving existing Studio outputs.
chat.noSessionsFoundWithFilter: No sessions found with these filters
chat.liveUpdatesUnavailableDescription: Refresh the page or sign in again to continue sending messages.
chat.authErrorDescription: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
chat.modelRequiredDescription: This agent has no model configured yet. Open Agent Settings and choose one first.
chat.modelRequiredError: No model is configured for this agent. Open Agent Settings and select a model first.
chat.modelRequiredPlaceholder: Select a model in Agent Settings before sending a message.
chat.composerPlaceholderMobile: Ask about campaigns, files, or skills...
chat.composerPlaceholderCompact: Ask about a project, files, or skills. Use @ for files and / for skills.
chat.composerPlaceholderDefault: Ask about your project, marketing plan, or workspace. Use @ for files and / for skills.
chat.composerHintBusyMobile: Send queues the message. Steer in the queue sends it directly into the running agent loop.
chat.composerHintBusyDesktop: Send queues the message. Steer in the queue sends it directly into the running agent loop.
chat.composerHintIdle: Type @ for files, / for skills, or pick a quick action below.

sm-campaign.title: Visual social campaign
sm-campaign.description: Develop the concept, channel structure, and creative direction for a strong social media campaign.
sm-campaign.prompt: Help me develop a visual social media campaign for my business. Create a concept with a core idea, platform-specific formats, visual direction, hook variations, CTA approaches, and a compact editorial plan for the first two weeks.

ad-creatives.title: Plan ad creatives
ad-creatives.description: Prepare concrete image and copy ideas for multiple ad formats.
ad-creatives.prompt: Create several strong ad creatives for my offer. I need different angles, visual ideas, headline options, CTA variations, and clear suggestions for static ads, carousel ads, and short video ads.

video-production.title: Develop video ideas
video-production.description: Structure script, scenes, and production notes for marketing or product videos.
video-production.prompt: Help me develop a short marketing or product video. I want a concept with the goal, audience, storyline, shot list, voiceover, on-screen text, and a clear production flow for a video under 45 seconds.

business-strategy.title: Build a strategy
business-strategy.description: Break a business or marketing initiative into goals, priorities, and actions.
business-strategy.prompt: Work with me on a practical business or marketing strategy. I need a clear structure covering the target vision, positioning, audience, priorities, risks, actions for the next 30 days, and concrete next steps.

document-draft.title: Draft a document
document-draft.description: Build and structure a clean brief, proposal, or internal document.
document-draft.prompt: Help me create a professional document. I need a sensible structure, clear chapters, draft wording, and notes about what information is still missing so it can become, for example, a brief, proposal, or concept document.

workspace-organization.title: Organize files
workspace-organization.description: Set up a productive folder and file structure for projects, campaigns, or clients.
workspace-organization.prompt: Help me organize my files and project materials better. Create a sensible workspace structure with folder logic, file naming, storage for assets and documents, and simple rules so my team can work faster and spend less time searching.

studio-product-photo.title: Generate a product photo
studio-product-photo.description: Prepare a polished product visual with lighting, background, and format guidance.
studio-product-photo.prompt: Create a high-quality product photo for my product. Develop a Studio prompt with a fitting background, lighting setup, camera angle, composition, social ad format, and clear variants for different looks.

studio-image-to-video.title: Turn image into video
studio-image-to-video.description: Develop a short video from a still with camera motion, timing, and mood.
studio-image-to-video.prompt: Turn the current image into a short product video. Describe the camera movement, scene setup, timing, light, mood, motion details, and turn that into a precise video generation prompt.

studio-ad-variants.title: Build creative variants
studio-ad-variants.description: Work out multiple photo or video angles for ads, social posts, and campaigns.
studio-ad-variants.prompt: Develop 5 strong photo or video creative variants for my product. For each variant, include the hook, visual idea, prompt, format, target platform, and a short reason why the angle can work.

studio-preset-prompt.title: Sharpen a preset prompt
studio-preset-prompt.description: Combine a Studio preset with product, style, audience, and visual idea.
studio-preset-prompt.prompt: Help me use a fitting Studio preset for my goal. Write a precise prompt that combines product, style, target audience, lighting, background, composition, and desired output format.

studio-persona-shot.title: Persona or model shot
studio-persona-shot.description: Plan lifestyle visuals with persona, product, environment, pose, and visual language.
studio-persona-shot.prompt: Create a lifestyle or model visual for my product. Describe the persona, environment, pose, styling, lighting, product placement, visual language, and provide a concrete generation prompt.

studio-improve-output.title: Improve the result
studio-improve-output.description: Analyze the current Studio output and optimize it for the next version.
studio-improve-output.prompt: Analyze the current Studio result and suggest concrete improvements. Focus on product presentation, composition, lighting, background, brand effect, and write an improved prompt for the next version.

hero.title: What would you like to create?
hero.description: Describe your intent or pick a use case. The agent handles the rest.
hero.placeholder: What would you like to create?

campaign.title: Campaign
prompts: Develop a concept for a social media campaign
Create a 2-week editorial plan
Plan visual styles for a brand
Write hook variations for different platforms
Design a content brief for a new product
Create a campaign timeline with milestones

creative.title: Creative
prompts: Generate a hero image for a landing page
Create variations of a product photo
Localize an ad for the Spanish market
Develop a style guide for campaign images
Create a moodboard for a new collection

video.title: Video
prompts: Develop a script for a 30-second product video
Plan a shot list for an image video
Create storyboard descriptions for a campaign
Write voiceover text for an explainer video

strategy.title: Strategy
prompts: Analyze the market for [industry]
Develop a positioning for [product]
Create a 30-day marketing plan
Identify the top 3 competitors and their weaknesses

document.title: Document
prompts: Write a brief for [project name]
Create a proposal for [client]
Summarize meeting notes into action items
Develop project documentation

providerEnv.ollamaNotConfigured: Required field not configured yet. A fallback will be generated automatically when saving.

oauth.pendingDefault: Authorization code received. Waiting for provider completion...

dialog.title: Connect OAuth Account
dialog.description: Complete the authentication to connect your account.
dialog.waitingForUrlDescription: This may take a few seconds
dialog.step1Description: Click the button to open the authorization page:
dialog.step2Description: After authenticating in the browser, paste the authorization code or callback URL here:
dialog.codePlaceholder: Paste authorization code or callback URL...

errors.timeoutWaitingForUrl: Timeout while waiting for authorization URL
errors.enterCode: Please enter the authorization code or callback URL

emailAccounts.title: Email Accounts
emailAccounts.description: Connect email accounts and control which senders can be read or recipients can be used for sending.
emailAccounts.summary: {count, plural, =0 {No accounts} one {# account connected} other {# accounts connected}}

oauth.googleManagedDescription: Connect Gmail accounts with Canvas Managed Services.
oauth.googleLocalDescription: Used for connecting Gmail accounts in self-hosted setups.
oauth.microsoftManagedDescription: Connect Microsoft 365 or Outlook accounts with Canvas Managed Services.
oauth.microsoftLocalDescription: Used for connecting Microsoft 365 or Outlook accounts.

policy.readFromDescription: Add one sender per line or separate with commas. Use full addresses like name@example.com or domains like @example.com. Empty means all senders are allowed.
policy.sendToDescription: Add one recipient per line or separate with commas. Use full addresses like name@example.com or domains like @example.com. Empty means all recipients are allowed.

errors.loadOAuthSettings: Failed to load email OAuth settings
errors.oauthCredentialsRequired: Client ID and Client Secret are required before saving or connecting OAuth.
errors.loadIntegrationKeys: Failed to load current integration keys
errors.missingAuthorizationUrl: Email OAuth did not return an authorization URL.

skills.title: Skill Gallery
skills.metadataDescription: Browse and manage Canvas Notebook skills.

integrationsHint.label: Note:
integrationsHint.body: If skills require environment variables, they must be stored in the integrations tab.

creationHint.label: Create a new skill:
creationHint.bodyBefore: Tell the agent that you want to create a new skill. You can then work out together what the skill should do. Use the

upload.title: Upload Skill
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop or click to upload
upload.requirement1: .md file must contain skill name and description formatted in YAML
upload.requirement2: .zip or .skill file must include a SKILL.md file
upload.alreadyExists: Skill "{name}" already exists. Edit it in the skill editor instead.

emptyState.title: No Skills Found
emptyState.description: Skills will appear here once they are added to the /data/skills/ directory.

detail.srDescription: Details and documentation for the selected skill.
detail.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the skill "{name}" and all its files. This action cannot be undone.

intro.prefix: Plan recurring agent jobs for the same workspace. Run history is stored in the database; workspace files are created only when a target path or task requires them.

overview.title: Overview
overview.emptySelectionDescription: Open an existing automation or create a new recurring agent job.

editor.description: Keep it non-technical. The agent will execute the task in the workspace later.

placeholders.name: Daily market check
placeholders.prompt: Describe the agent task in plain language...

output.title: Where should the results be stored?
output.description: Optional. If left empty, run results stay in the automation history unless the task explicitly creates workspace files.

triggers.setupRequiredDescription: Connect Composio in Integrations so external apps can trigger automations in Canvas Notebook.
triggers.noApps: No app with available webhook triggers was found.
triggers.connectDescription: This app must be connected before it can trigger webhook automations.
triggers.noConfig: This trigger does not need additional fields.
triggers.promptHintDescription: Describe when the agent should react, what it should do with the event, and whether it should only take actions or create files in the workspace.
triggers.sidebarWebhookDescription: Composio sends an event to Canvas. Canvas verifies the event and then starts this exact automation.
triggers.sidebarModesDescription: The UI uses the same Canvas endpoints. Local uses the local Composio key, managed runs through the Control Plane.

custom.detailDescription: This endpoint starts exactly this automation when the matching secret is sent in the Authorization header.
custom.secretOnce: This secret is shown in plain text only now. After that, only the preview remains visible.
custom.hintTitle: For your own scripts and integrations
custom.hintDescription: Canvas creates one webhook URL and one dedicated secret for this automation. Send JSON with POST and use an Idempotency-Key if your system can retry events.
custom.sidebarDescription: Your code calls Canvas directly. No Composio account is required.
custom.sidebarSecretDescription: When the automation is deleted, its webhook access disappears too. Rotation affects only this one automation.

placeholders.name: Webhook: Check deployment
placeholders.prompt: When an event arrives, inspect the JSON, summarize the result, and create concrete next steps when failures are reported...

errors.create: Webhook automation could not be created.
errors.rotate: Webhook secret could not be rotated.

placeholders.name: Gmail: Handle new request
placeholders.prompt: If the event is relevant, inspect the content, decide the next steps, and perform the appropriate action...

errors.loadApps: Composio triggers could not be loaded.
errors.loadEvents: Events for this app could not be loaded.
errors.create: Trigger automation could not be created.

skills.description: Optional. The agent receives this skill preference for every run.

runs.title: Run history
runs.description: Status, results, and logs for the selected automation.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Raw event log for the selected execution.

session.title: Run chat
session.description: Read-only history of the linked session. You can continue the same session in chat at any time.
session.pending: The session was created but has not been fully persisted yet.
session.noSession: No session has been created for this run yet.

directoryPicker.title: Choose folder in workspace
directoryPicker.description: Choose an existing base folder in the workspace inspector. The tree starts collapsed by default.
directoryPicker.helpLineOne: Only folders inside the workspace can be selected.
directoryPicker.helpLineTwo: If you do not set your own path, the automation automatically uses its default folder.

errors.loadSession: Chat history could not be loaded.

studio.title: Studio
studio.comingSoon: Coming Soon — This feature will be available soon.

gemini.title: GEMINI_API_KEY is missing
gemini.description: This self-hosted instance needs a GEMINI_API_KEY for Gemini images, Veo videos, or Lyria sound. Managed instances use the Canvas Control Plane fallback automatically.

openai.title: OPENAI_API_KEY is missing
openai.description: This self-hosted instance needs an OPENAI_API_KEY to use OpenAI image models in Studio. Managed instances use the Canvas Control Plane fallback automatically.

kie.title: KIE_API_KEY is missing for Seedance 2.0
kie.description: This self-hosted instance needs a KIE.ai API key to use Seedance 2.0 as a video model. Managed instances use the Canvas Control Plane fallback automatically.

modelLibrary.emptyProductDescription: Create your first product to reference images in AI generations.
modelLibrary.emptyPersonaDescription: Create your first persona to use consistent characters in generations.
modelLibrary.emptyStyleDescription: Create your first style to reference visual styles in AI generations.

modelCreate.name: Name
modelCreate.dropzone: Drop images here or click to select
modelCreate.noImages: No images selected yet. Click "Add images" to choose from Studio, Workspace, Upload, or URLs.

modelDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: This model may be referenced in generations. The reference will be marked as [Deleted]. Continue?

bulk.title: Bulk Generate
bulk.description: Apply a studio preset to multiple products at once with per-item overrides.
bulk.lineItemsEmpty: Select products above to configure per-item overrides

dashboard.headline: Start with a visual direction, then build from products, personas, and presets.
dashboard.subheadline: Your outputs will appear here in reverse chronological order. Use the prompt bar to create images or videos.

quickActions.newProductDesc: Create a new product with images.
quickActions.startBulkDesc: Start a batch generation for multiple products.

emptyState.title: Create your first image
emptyState.subtitle: Type your idea below and let the AI work its magic. Your results will appear here – in real time.

referencePicker.title: Select image reference
referencePicker.description: Choose already generated studio images, files from your workspace, or upload new references.

upload.hint: Upload images to use as references for studio generations.
upload.dragHint: Or drag & drop files anywhere on this dialog.

referencePicker.urlTabDescription: Enter an image URL. The image will be downloaded and saved as a reference.

promptBar.title: Prompt Bar
promptBar.allReferencesSelected: All matching references have already been added
promptBar.placeholder: Describe the scene, subject, and intended output...

aspectRatioEditor.title: Aspect Ratio Editor
aspectRatioEditor.description: Crop locally or extend missing edges with OpenAI/Gemini.

empty.title: Select an image
empty.description: The same Studio Image Picker is used in single-select mode.

aspectRatioEditor.presetHint: Hold Shift while dragging to keep the current aspect ratio. Use the mouse wheel to zoom, drag the background to move the canvas.

ratioLock.label: Keep format
ratioLock.description: Keeps the selected format while dragging corners. Shift still works as a temporary lock.

snap.label: Edge snap
snap.description: Lightly docks the frame near image edges so small moves stay in crop mode.

aspectRatioEditor.cropNotice: The frame is inside the image. The result will be cropped locally without an AI request.
aspectRatioEditor.unsupportedRatio: This aspect ratio is not supported by the selected provider. Choose a format from the active provider list.

workspaceDialog.title: Copy to workspace
workspaceDialog.description: Choose a target folder and file name for the finished edit.

overwriteDialog.title: Overwrite original?
overwriteDialog.description: This action replaces the current source file with the preview from /data/studio/edits. The preview remains stored separately.

tips.square: Perfect for Instagram & X posts, profile pictures
tips.widescreen: Standard for desktop websites, YouTube thumbnails
tips.portraitVideo: Ideal for Instagram Reels, TikTok & Stories

header.title: Usage Analytics
header.description: Tokens and costs based on PI usage events since the ledger rollout.

summary.title: Grouped Summary
summary.empty: No usage events found for the current filters.

events.title: Recent Usage Events
events.empty: No usage events found for the current filters.

intro.title: Welcome to Help
intro.description: Here you will find tutorials and guides for Canvas Notebook. Click a card to learn more.
